title: Alt-Rock 90s
summary: 112 BPM 90s alternative rock - jangly clean-to-distorted guitars, melodic bass, brooding mood.
prompt: A 90s alternative rock instrumental at 112 BPM. Jangly clean guitar arpeggios that explode into distorted power chords on the chorus, melodic finger-picked bassline, mid-tempo drums with cymbal swells, brooding minor-key melody. Pacific Northwest grunge meets Britpop sensibility - quiet-loud-quiet dynamics, raw analog production.
